01222121120020100011110220210200000 - ASI: 24

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  000 = 0 * 00
  211 = 2 * 11
  0122 = 01 * 22
  0220 = 02 * 20
  1111 = 11 * 11
  2002 = 20 * 02
  2102 = 21 * 02
  00000 = 00 * 000
  01000 = 01 * 000
  21211 = 21 * 211
  11110220 = 1111 * 0220
  012221211 = 0122 * 21211
  200201000 = 2002 * 01000
  210200000 = 2102 * 00000
  11110220210200000 = 11110220 * 210200000
  012221211200201000 = 012221211 * 200201000
  01222121120020100011110220210200000 = 012221211200201000 * 11110220210200000
